name: autochips
description: AutoChips is a leading Chinese automotive semiconductor company specializing in vehicle-grade MCUs, power devices, and sensor solutions. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support and supply chain services for AutoChips products serving automotive electronics, industrial control, and new energy vehicle applications.
longDescription: AutoChips  is a premier automotive semiconductor design company headquartered in China, dedicated to providing high-performance, reliable automotive-grade integrated circuits. Founded with a mission to support the domestic automotive electronics industry, AutoChips has established itself as a trusted supplier in the automotive semiconductor market. The company's product portfolio encompasses vehicle-grade microcontrollers (MCUs), power management ICs, motor driver ICs, and sensor interface solutions, serving diverse automotive applications including body electronics, powertrain systems, chassis control, and new energy vehicle battery management. AutoChips products are designed to meet stringent automotive quality standards including AEC-Q100 qualification, ensuring reliable operation in harsh automotive environments. As an authorized AutoChips distributor, LiTong Electronics offers customers direct access to the complete product line, backed by expert technical support, application guidance, and flexible logistics services. Our FAE team provides comprehensive assistance from initial product selection through production ramp, ensuring customers achieve optimal performance and cost efficiency in their automotive designs.

coreProducts.name: Automotive MCUs
coreProducts.description: Vehicle-grade microcontrollers with ARM Cortex cores, ASIL-B/D functional safety support, and comprehensive peripheral sets for automotive control applications.

coreProducts.name: Power Management ICs
coreProducts.description: Automotive-qualified voltage regulators and power management solutions with wide input voltage range, low quiescent current, and comprehensive protection features.

coreProducts.name: Motor Driver ICs
coreProducts.description: High-performance motor driver ICs for brushless DC motors and stepper motors, featuring integrated gate drivers, current sensing, and diagnostic capabilities.

coreProducts.name: Sensor Interface ICs
coreProducts.description: Signal conditioning and interface solutions for automotive sensors including pressure, temperature, and position sensors with high accuracy and reliability.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Body control modules, powertrain control, chassis systems, and safety applications requiring AEC-Q100 qualified components with functional safety support.

industries.name: New Energy Vehicles
industries.description: Battery management systems, motor control, on-board chargers, and DC-DC converters for electric and hybrid vehicle applications.

industries.name: Industrial Control
industries.description: Industrial automation, motor drives, and power conversion systems requiring high reliability and wide temperature range operation.

industries.name: Intelligent Transportation
industries.description: Vehicle networking, telematics, and intelligent transportation systems requiring robust communication and processing capabilities.

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification ensuring components meet stringent automotive reliability standards for temperature, ESD, and lifetime requirements.

certifications.name: ISO 26262
certifications.description: Functional safety standard for automotive electrical and electronic systems, supporting ASIL-B and ASIL-D safety integrity levels.

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Quality management system certification for automotive production, ensuring consistent product quality and continuous improvement processes.

seoTitle: AutoChips Authorized Distributor | Automotive MCUs & Power ICs - LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of AutoChips automotive MCUs, power management ICs, motor drivers, and sensor interfaces. Technical support and selection guide available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of AutoChips products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of AutoChips automotive semiconductor products. Our partnership provides customers with guaranteed authentic products, factory-direct pricing, and comprehensive technical support. As an authorized distributor, we maintain inventory of popular AutoChips products and can support both prototype and high-volume production requirements. Our FAE team has received direct training from AutoChips engineers and can provide expert guidance on product selection, application design, and troubleshooting. We provide full traceability documentation and quality certificates for all AutoChips products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for AutoChips product inquiries, samples, and technical documentation. Our team can provide competitive pricing and lead time information for your specific requirements.

faqs.question: What are AutoChips' core competitive advantages in the automotive semiconductor market?
faqs.answer: AutoChips offers several key competitive advantages in the automotive semiconductor market. First, the company provides AEC-Q100 qualified products at competitive price points, delivering comparable performance to international brands with better local support. Second, AutoChips maintains strong R&D capabilities with continuous innovation in automotive-grade MCUs and power management solutions. Third, the company offers comprehensive product portfolios covering MCUs, PMICs, motor drivers, and sensor interfaces, enabling one-stop sourcing for automotive electronics. Fourth, AutoChips products are designed with functional safety support (ASIL-B/D) meeting modern automotive safety requirements. Finally, as a Chinese company, AutoChips offers supply chain advantages including shorter lead times and better support for local automotive manufacturers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate AutoChips products for your cost-sensitive automotive applications while maintaining AEC-Q100 quality requirements. Contact LiTong FAEs for competitive analysis and sample evaluation.

faqs.question: How do AutoChips products compare to international brands like NXP and Infineon?
faqs.answer: AutoChips products offer competitive alternatives to international brands with comparable electrical specifications in many automotive applications. In automotive MCUs, AutoChips' AC7801x series achieves performance levels similar to mainstream automotive MCUs with ARM Cortex-M0/M3/M4 cores. Power management ICs provide comparable voltage regulation, thermal performance, and protection features. The key differences are typically in the highest functional safety levels (ASIL-D for safety-critical systems) and certain specialized high-temperature applications above 150°C. For mainstream automotive applications (body control, HVAC, lighting, battery management), AutoChips products provide excellent performance at significantly lower cost. Many automotive manufacturers successfully use AutoChips as a second source or cost-reduction alternative for established designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: For standard automotive applications requiring AEC-Q100 qualification, AutoChips offers excellent value. Contact LiTong for detailed comparison matrices and cross-reference guides.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for AutoChips products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for AutoChips products through our experienced FAE team. Support services include product selection guidance based on automotive application requirements, schematic and PCB layout review, application troubleshooting, and reference design consultation. We offer sample evaluation support, datasheet interpretation, and parameter analysis. For complex automotive designs, our FAEs can provide functional safety guidance, EMC design recommendations, and production testing assistance. LiTong also maintains a library of application notes, reference designs, and FAQ documentation specific to automotive applications. Customers can access support through phone, email, or on-site visits depending on project requirements and location.
faqs.decisionGuide: Leverage LiTong's FAE support throughout your automotive design cycle from concept to production. Contact us early in your design phase for optimal product selection guidance.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for AutoChips products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for AutoChips products vary based on product type and order volume. Standard products typically have 6-8 week lead times for moderate volumes. Popular high-volume products are often stocked by LiTong for immediate delivery. For large automotive production orders, lead times can be negotiated with factory support. AutoChips' domestic manufacturing advantage often results in shorter and more predictable lead times compared to overseas suppliers. LiTong maintains safety stock of commonly used automotive products to support urgent requirements and production line continuity. For specific lead time information, customers should contact LiTong with their product requirements and forecast volumes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Plan your procurement with standard 6-8 week lead times. Contact LiTong for current stock status and expedited delivery options for urgent requirements.

faqs.question: Does AutoChips offer AEC-Q100 qualified products for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, AutoChips offers a comprehensive portfolio of AEC-Q100 qualified products for automotive applications. The AEC-Q100 qualification ensures components meet stringent automotive reliability standards including extended temperature ranges (-40°C to +125°C or +150°C), ESD protection, and long-term reliability requirements. AutoChips MCUs, power management ICs, motor drivers, and sensor interfaces have achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 1 or Grade 0 qualification, making them suitable for under-hood and safety-critical automotive applications. These products undergo enhanced reliability testing including high-temperature operating life, temperature cycling, and ESD testing. For safety-critical applications requiring ASIL compliance, AutoChips provides products with functional safety documentation and safety manuals.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for current AEC-Q100 qualified product availability and functional safety documentation for your automotive applications.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of sourcing AutoChips products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Sourcing AutoChips products through LiTong offers multiple advantages. As an authorized distributor, we guarantee product authenticity and factory-direct pricing. Our local inventory and logistics capabilities enable faster delivery compared to direct factory orders. LiTong provides value-added technical support from our FAE team with deep AutoChips product knowledge and automotive application experience. We offer flexible payment terms and credit options for qualified automotive customers. Our quality management system ensures proper handling and storage of sensitive automotive components according to AEC-Q100 requirements. LiTong can support VMI (Vendor Managed Inventory) programs for high-volume automotive customers. Additionally, we provide consolidated sourcing for multiple automotive component lines, simplifying procurement processes for tier-1 and tier-2 automotive suppliers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Partner with LiTong for reliable AutoChips supply, technical support, and competitive pricing. Contact our sales team to discuss your specific procurement requirements.
